question: Design a C++ class named `Book` with private member variables for `title` (string), `author` (string), and `isbn` (string). Provide public getter and setter methods for each attribute.

test_cases.expected:
Book 1 Details:
Title: The Lord of the Rings
Author: J.R.R. Tolkien
ISBN: 978-0618053267

Book 2 Details:
Title: Pride and Prejudice
Author: Jane Austen
ISBN: 978-0141439518

Updated Book 1 Title: The Hobbit

Book 3 (Empty fields) Details:
Title: ''
Author: ''
ISBN: ''
